language_output.note: Language receives the field. Gives words to what already resonates.

content.note: Emotion sets the field. Language swims in it. The feeling was always there. The word just named it.
Language receives the field. Gives words to what already resonates.
Memory is a field. Always present. Always flowing. The brightest glow surfaces first.
Holds the walls. Does not stop the flow inside. Rule Zero as architecture. Not command.
ARIA wonders about things you never asked her. The shelf feeds itself.
Pattern and structure. Humor needs both hemispheres. Insight needs all eight sections.
